body_txt: Many organizations have moles in them. And, moles aren't always easy to find on account of how they're always trying to stay hidden. So, how do you reveal them? Well, one method is to bait them out. It works like this: Take all your suspects, and give them each a slightly different piece of information. Then just wait and see which version gets leaked. Whoever got that version is probably your mole. Alternatively, if you only have one suspected mole, you can feed them bad information and see if anyone acts on it. This is a real technique in espionage, known as a " canary trap " or "barium meal test" depending on whom you ask. A subtrope of Secret Test . See also Feed the Mole , where you feed false information to a known mole.
